setup.title: Setup
setup.welcome: Welcome to LibreStreamer! Let's get you set up.
setup.admin_desc: This will be your master account to manage the server.
setup.backend_desc: Where is your media stored? You can add more later.
setup.local_backend_desc: Run a LibreStreamer backend on this machine. Great for single-server setups.
setup.remote_backend_desc: Connect to a LibreStreamer backend on another machine.
setup.jellyfin_desc: Connect to an existing Jellyfin server via its API.
setup.media_paths_desc: Add the directories containing your media files.
setup.no_items_found: No media items found. Check your paths and try rescanning from the admin panel.
setup.scan_failed: Failed to scan libraries. You can retry from the admin panel later.
setup.complete_desc: Your LibreStreamer server is ready to use. Log in with your admin account to start streaming.
setup.err_username_short: Username must be at least 2 characters
setup.err_password_short: Password must be at least 4 characters
setup.err_media_paths: Add at least one media path
setup.err_host_apikey: Host and API key are required
